title: Unique Fishing Rods
description: Every rod gets its own bobber, so each one can act as a remote redstone trigger.
body:
Unique Fishing Rods makes every fishing rod track its own bobber, so each rod can be used independently instead of sharing a single fishing state.

This allows fishing rods to function as simple remote redstone triggers, opening up new possibilities for technical builds and contraptions.

Features:

  • Each fishing rod gets its own bobber
  • Multiple rods can remain active at the same time
  • Works as a remote redstone activation tool

For example, you can create multiple ender pearl stasis chambers or trigger separate mechanisms from a distance using different rods.

Notes: This mod is server-side. Installing it on the client is optional, but improves visual consistency.
